title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at CDSL

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at CDSL
jsonLd.description:
We at CDSL are looking for an experienced Financial Analyst based out of Navi Mumbai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About CDSL:
CDSL is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CDSL!
